name: Ameris Capital Administradora General de Fondos S.A.- Fundo de Inversion Ameris Deuda Directa Fund
summary: Ameris Capital Administradora General de Fondos S.A. - Fundo de Inversion Ameris Deuda Directa Fund is a fund focused on direct debt investments. It is managed by Ameris Capital Administradora General de Fondos S.A. and aims to provide investors with returns through investments in debt instruments.
